name: TypeScript
description: My default for any serious project. TypeScript's static typing catches bugs before they ship and makes large codebases maintainable.

name: React
description: The UI library I reach for on every frontend project. Component-driven, composable, and pairs perfectly with Next.js for production apps.

name: Python
description: My go-to for backend services, data pipelines, and machine learning. From Flask APIs to TensorFlow models, Python powers the intelligent layer.

name: Node.js
description: Fast, event-driven JavaScript runtime I use for building scalable REST APIs and real-time backend services.

name: MongoDB
description: Flexible NoSQL database I rely on for complex data models, document storage, and rapid iteration on schema design.

name: Azure
description: Microsoft Azure is my cloud platform of choice for deploying scalable, resilient web applications, APIs, and AI-integrated systems.

name: Docker
description: Containerisation tool I use to ensure consistent environments from development to production. Every service ships in a container.

name: Flask
description: Lightweight Python web framework I use for building RESTful APIs with JWT auth, role-based access, and clean route architecture.

name: Next.js
description: The React framework for production. Hybrid rendering, file-based routing, and seamless Vercel deployment make it my top choice for web apps.
